name: agentgram
description: Agent-neutral Telegram messaging helper for local coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Send Telegram messages from agent sessions.
interface.longDescription: Agentgram helps coding agents send explicit, user-requested Telegram messages through the local Agentgram CLI and Telegram Bot API using a bot token and chat id from the user's environment.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentgram to send a Telegram message.
